About.heading: About Me
About.story1: I'm Quan, an AI Engineer who believes technology should feel human. My journey started with a curiosity about how machines understand language, and it led me deep into the world of natural language processing and large language models.
About.story2: Today, I design and build intelligent systems that go beyond simple automation. From orchestrating multi-agent workflows to architecting retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, I focus on making AI that's reliable, explainable, and genuinely useful.
About.expertise: My core expertise spans NLP, LLM fine-tuning and orchestration, multi-agent system design, and RAG architecture. I'm passionate about bridging the gap between cutting-edge research and production-ready applications that real people use every day.

Footer.copyright: Ha Minh Quan. All rights reserved.
